name: At Sunny's Table
subject: A Sloth Family Picture Book Series
tagline: Patience, quiet, and the slow warmth of belonging.
blurb: A gentle sloth family gathers around the table to learn — slowly, lovingly — that good things are worth the wait. Stories about patience, connection, and feeling like you belong.
metaTitle: At Sunny's Table — A Sloth Family Picture Book Series | Made Out of Clay
metaDescription: Three gentle picture books about patience, quiet, and sibling love. By Isaiah Hartwell. On Amazon, $13.99.

name: Just the Way You Are
subject: Neurodiversity Picture Books for Kids
tagline: For the kids who don't fit the mold — and the families raising them.
blurb: Inclusion and neurodiversity picture books inspired by a real boy named Clayton. Identity-first, deficit-free stories that celebrate kids exactly as they are.
metaTitle: Just the Way You Are — Neurodiversity Picture Books for Kids | Made Out of Clay
metaDescription: Inclusion and neurodiversity picture books for the kids who don't fit the mold — and the families raising them.

name: The Kingdom of Judea
subject: A Lion Adventure Picture Book Series
tagline: Courage, home, and who you become along the way.
blurb: Caleb and the Cubs set out on an epic lion-kingdom adventure about courage, homeland, and growing into who you're meant to be.
metaTitle: The Kingdom of Judea — A Lion Adventure Picture Book Series | Made Out of Clay
metaDescription: Caleb and the Cubs: an epic lion-kingdom adventure about courage, home, and who you become.
